name.description: Unique addon identifier, must match the chart name in the OCI registry

category.description: Addon category, must match AddonCategory enum in cluster-manager

namespace.description: Default Kubernetes namespace for the addon

chart.description: Chart name in the OCI registry (combined with config.yaml repository to form the full OCI URL)

originalRepo.description: Upstream Helm repository URL the chart was sourced from. Empty for internal Kluisz-only charts.

isDefault.description: Whether this addon should be preselected by default for users

defaultValues.description: Helm values applied at install/upgrade time (apply-time). Passed to the cluster-manager as default overrides.

valuesYAML.description: Raw Helm values YAML string, equivalent to --values flag content

compileTimeValues.description: Helm values used only during CI chart sync (compile-time). Applied when rendering the chart to extract and mirror images.

valuesYAML.description: Raw Helm values YAML string used during image extraction and mirroring

versions.description: List of available versions, ordered newest first

chartVersion.description: OCI tag used to pull the Helm chart

deprecated.description: Mark version as deprecated; still visible but not recommended

releaseNotes.description: Changelog or release notes for this version

dependencies.description: Other addons that must be installed before this version
